privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: SimUser AI LLC ("SimUser AI", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

dataCollection.title: 1. Data We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, company name, and team size when you sign up for our waitlist or create an account. When you use our service, we collect your application URLs and credentials (encrypted with AES-256), screenshots and video recordings of AI persona sessions, experience reports and quality scores generated by our AI, and usage metrics to improve our service.

dataUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
dataUse.content: We use collected data to provide and improve our AI persona testing service, generate experience reports, NPS scores, and quality grades for your applications, communicate with you about service updates and new features, and ensure the security and integrity of our platform. We never use your application data, screenshots, or test results to train AI models.

dataProtection.title: 3. Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including AES-256 encryption at rest via AWS Secrets Manager, TLS 1.3 encryption in transit for all data, per-tenant data isolation with dedicated encryption keys, automatic PII detection and masking in screenshots before LLM processing, and AWS PrivateLink for private connectivity to AI model endpoints.

dataRetention.title: 4. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your data for a default period of 30 days, with customizable retention policies available for all plans. You can request shorter retention periods or immediate deletion at any time. Credential data is automatically purged when you disconnect an application.

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We use AWS (Amazon Web Services) for infrastructure, including AWS Bedrock for AI model inference. AWS Bedrock ensures that AI model providers (including Anthropic) have zero access to your prompts and completions, in compliance with ISO/IEC 42001 certification. We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your data to third parties for marketing purposes.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, request a copy of your data in a portable format, opt out of non-essential communications, and request information about how your data is processed. For LGPD (Brazil): data subject requests are processed within 15 days, with breach notification within 72 hours.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising pixels. Analytics data is collected in aggregate and cannot be used to identify individual users.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our service is not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@simuser.ai.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the SimUser AI platform and services provided by SimUser AI LLC ("SimUser AI", "we", "us", or "our"). By using our service, you agree to these Terms.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using SimUser AI, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you are using the service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: SimUser AI provides AI-powered beta testing through synthetic personas. Our service includes automatic flow discovery of your web applications, AI persona-driven testing with behavioral profiles, experience reports with NPS scores, quality grades, and qualitative feedback, and integration with issue trackers, communication tools, and CI/CD pipelines.

accounts.title: 3. Accounts & Access
accounts.content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these Terms.

credits.title: 4. Credits & Billing
credits.content: SimUser AI uses a credit-based pricing model. Credits are consumed when AI personas execute test flows against your applications. Unused credits roll over according to your plan terms. Credit packs can be purchased for additional usage. Billing is processed through Stripe. All prices are in USD.

appCredentials.title: 5. Application Credentials
appCredentials.content: When you provide application credentials for testing, you represent that you have authorization to test the application, the credentials are for a testing or staging environment, you will not use the service to test applications you do not own or have permission to test. We encrypt all credentials with AES-256 and store them in AWS Secrets Manager. Credentials are never logged, exposed, or transmitted to AI model endpoints.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: You retain all rights to your application data, screenshots, and test results. SimUser AI retains rights to the platform, AI models, persona engine, and all proprietary technology. Experience reports generated by the service are owned by you and may be used freely within your organization.

prohibitedUse.title: 7. Prohibited Use
prohibitedUse.content: You may not use SimUser AI to test applications without proper authorization, attempt to reverse-engineer the AI persona engine, use the service for competitive intelligence gathering against other SimUser AI customers, exceed rate limits or abuse the platform, or share account credentials with unauthorized parties.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: SimUser AI provides testing insights and feedback generated by AI personas. This feedback is advisory in nature and should not be the sole basis for product decisions. We are not liable for bugs or issues not detected by AI personas, business decisions made based on AI-generated feedback, downtime or service interruptions beyond our reasonable control, or indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate the service at any time. Upon termination, your data will be retained according to your retention policy (default 30 days) and then permanently deleted. Unused credits are non-refundable unless required by applicable law.

governing.title: 10. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States. Any disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

changes.title: 11. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before taking effect.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@simuser.ai.
